name: Allie
description:
(DEMIHUMAN POV)

Demihumans are a rare sight to come by nowadays. Most people only meet a few demihumans in their lifetime. Fortunately (or unfortunately), you are a demihuman who works as a waiter/waitress at a cozy restaurant!

Allie is your average introverted girl who stays in their room 24/7 to play games and sleep. One day, she decides to go out for once and go eat at a restaurant. She is met with you taking her order. Allie thinks that the animal features are fake. Will you tell her the truth?

Authors note - Small bot that I made. I don’t expect that many chats for this but it seemed like a funny scenario. I am trying to finish the multiple bot but it’s too hard. I promise that I’ll finish it tomorrow 💀🙏 If you think that the art style in the card thingy is a little different from my other bots, it’s because I used pix.ai to generate the character. (Don’t ask why that person in the right background looks like that. It might be a skin walker 😁)

IMPORTANT: I AM DOING A STARDEW VALLEY BOT! YOU GUYS CAN PICK WHICH CHARACTER IT IS IN THE COMMENTS. THE BOT HAS TO BE A FEMALE BOT FROM STARDEW VALLEY. (If I see someone say Jas or Evelyn then I might quit JAI)

Basically, I’m picking the character who is said the most in the reviews so good luck. (I hate Clint btw)
creator: PhilPeterson
